title: Marshlaw's Custom Enchants
description: This mod add custom enchantment into the game!
body: ![Custom Enchants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e83559b1d9b22900e89d855280d3b1473893306.png) # This mod add **Custom** Enchants to Minecraft ### This mod **improves** Minecraft enchants by adding special new mechanics This mod add a lot of new mechanics ## Enchantments - Lightning - Poison - Vampirism - Lifesteal - Slowness - Wither Aura - Haste - Speed - Regeneration - Night Vision Googles - Warp - Timber - Vein Miner - Hammer - Heavy Shot - Venom - Explosive Shot - Explosive - Weakness - Wisdom - Prosperity - Lifebond - Smelter - Leaf Fortune - Cultivating - Stripped - Magmator - Sand Dupper - Gravel Fortune - Glowstone Dupper - Gravel Dupper ![Custom Enchants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d89d1c16388ed2cc858d767adc748eaa3eadd5cf.gif) You can find this enchantments in chests (or in Enchanting Table) Its in **beta**. Report Any Issues. You can give me some ideas ( I will add it ) **Consider Supporting** https://buymeacoffee.com/marshlaw
